2603.23989.title: CoCR-RAG: Enhancing Retrieval-Augmented Generation in Web Q&A via Concept-oriented Context Reconstruction
2603.23989.paper_summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has shown promising results in enhancing Q&A by incorporating information from the web and other external sources. However, the supporting documents retrieved from the heterogeneous web often originate from multiple sources with diverse writing styles, varying formats, and inconsistent granularity. Fusing such multi-source documents into a coherent and knowledge-intensive context remains a significant challenge, as the presence of irrelevant and redundant information can compromise the factual consistency of the inferred answers. This paper proposes the Concept-oriented Context Reconstruction RAG (CoCR-RAG), a framework that addresses the multi-source information fusion problem in RAG through linguistically grounded concept-level integration. Specifically, we introduce a concept distillation algorithm that extracts essential concepts from Abstract Meaning Representation (AMR), a stable semantic representation that structures the meaning of texts as logical graphs. The distilled concepts from multiple retrieved documents are then fused and reconstructed into a unified, information-intensive context by Large Language Models, which supplement only the necessary sentence elements to highlight the core knowledge. Experiments on the PopQA and EntityQuestions datasets demonstrate that CoCR-RAG significantly outperforms existing context-reconstruction methods across these Web Q&A benchmarks. Furthermore, CoCR-RAG shows robustness across various backbone LLMs, establishing itself as a flexible, plug-and-play component adaptable to different RAG frameworks.
2603.23989.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）在通過整合來自網絡和其他外部來源的信息來增強問答方面顯示出令人鼓舞的結果。<lb/>然而，從異質網絡中檢索到的支持文件通常來自多個來源，具有多樣的寫作風格、不同的格式和不一致的粒度。<lb/>將這些多來源文件融合成一個連貫且知識密集的上下文仍然是一個重大挑戰，因為不相關和冗餘信息的存在可能會損害推斷答案的事實一致性。<lb/>本文提出了以概念為導向的上下文重建RAG（CoCR-RAG），這是一個通過語言學基礎的概念級整合來解決RAG中的多來源信息融合問題的框架。<lb/>具體而言，我們介紹了一種概念蒸餾算法，該算法從抽象語義表示（AMR）中提取基本概念，AMR是一種穩定的語義表示，將文本的含義結構化為邏輯圖。<lb/>來自多個檢索文件的蒸餾概念然後由大型語言模型融合並重建為一個統一的信息密集型上下文，這些模型僅補充必要的句子元素以突出核心知識。<lb/>在PopQA和EntityQuestions數據集上的實驗表明，CoCR-RAG在這些Web問答基準上顯著優於現有的上下文重建方法。<lb/>此外，CoCR-RAG在各種主幹LLM上顯示出穩健性，確立了其作為一個靈活的即插即用組件，能夠適應不同的RAG框架。
2603.23989.author: Kaize Shi et.al.
2603.23989.authors: Kaize Shi, Xueyao Sun, Qika Lin, Firoj Alam, Qing Li, Xiaohui Tao, Guandong Xu
